prompt:
A dark, moody digital collage with a cinematic fantasy aesthetic. The central focus is a beautiful young Night Empress with long, wavy dark hair, wearing an intricate black lace gown and a dark jeweled crown, looking over her shoulder with a sharp, commanding gaze. The background is a deep, starry night featuring a silhouetted gothic castle and a large glowing moon with soft atmospheric haze.
Scatter elements throughout the frame including glowing violet butterflies, vintage polaroid-style photos of her in an ancient candlelit library, and an open leather journal with handwritten notes and a wax seal. Add subtle floating dust particles and faint magical light trails for depth.
The color palette is dominated by obsidian black, deep violet, and warm ember gold tones. Elegant gold serif text “MOONBORN SOVEREIGN” appears as a secondary title along with celestial symbols, creating a refined “character profile" aesthetic with balanced composition and symmetry. High-contrast cinematic lighting with a mystical, ethereal, ultra-detailed fantasy atmosphere.
